scientific_claim: RdDM is the major small RNA-mediated epigenetic pathway in plants
source_reported_content: The abstract states that RNA-directed DNA methylation is the major small RNA-mediated epigenetic pathway in plants
limitation: review article; not primary experimental evidence

scientific_claim: Canonical RdDM couples Pol IV-dependent 24-nt siRNA biogenesis with Pol V-mediated de novo methylation
source_reported_content: The review describes Pol IV transcripts copied by RDR2, processed by DCL3 into 24-nt siRNAs, loaded onto AGO4, paired with Pol V scaffold transcripts, and recruiting methyltransferase activity for CG/CHG/CHH methylation
method: literature synthesis of genetic and biochemical studies
figure_or_table_anchor: Fig. 1; Table 1; Canonical RdDM pathway mechanisms
confidence_level: high for outline; moderate for unresolved steps
limitation: Pol IV/Pol V templates and some accessory functions remain incompletely understood
source_location: Introductory canonical model; Canonical RdDM pathway mechanisms

scientific_claim: Pol IV is central to production of most canonical 24-nt siRNA precursors
source_reported_content: The review states that analyses of Pol IV-defective mutants show Pol IV is responsible for producing precursors of more than 90% of 24-nt siRNAs that guide canonical RdDM
limitation: underlying primary studies must be checked for exact experimental details

scientific_claim: SHH1 helps recruit Pol IV to a subset of targets through chromatin marks
source_reported_content: The review states that SHH1 binds H3K9me and unmethylated H3K4 through a tandem Tudor-like fold and recruits Pol IV to a subset of genomic targets
limitation: Pol IV recruitment is explicitly not fully understood

scientific_claim: Pol V scaffold transcripts help recruit silencing factors for de novo methylation
source_reported_content: The review states that Pol V transcripts are thought to provide scaffold RNAs that interact with siRNAs and recruit other silencing factors
figure_or_table_anchor: Fig. 1; Pol V-mediated de novo methylation
limitation: Pol V occupancy alone is not sufficient for RdDM at all sites

scientific_claim: RdDM preferentially affects some euchromatic transposon/repeat-associated targets rather than bulk pericentromeric heterochromatin
source_reported_content: The review states Pol V-mediated RdDM acts at many sites with preference for euchromatic small/young intergenic transposons and genes containing repeats; pericentromeric heterochromatin mostly relies on DDM1, MET1, CMT2 and CMT3
figure_or_table_anchor: Pol V-mediated de novo methylation; Interplay with chromatin features
limitation: target preference may vary by locus and species

scientific_claim: RdDM has been implicated in pathogen defence, stress responses, reproduction, and communication processes
source_reported_content: The abstract states RdDM is implicated in pathogen defence, stress responses, reproduction, interallelic communication and intercellular communication
limitation: each biological role has separate underlying evidence; do not treat as one uniform primary result
